/usr/bin/c++ -g -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/unit_tests.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/unit_tests.dir/unit/test_tokenizer.cpp.o CMakeFiles/unit_tests.dir/unit/test_dump.cpp.o CMakeFiles/unit_tests.dir/unit/test_tree_builder.cpp.o CMakeFiles/unit_tests.dir/__/frontend/lexer/src/tokenizer.cpp.o CMakeFiles/unit_tests.dir/__/frontend/parser/src/tree_builder.cpp.o -o unit_tests  /usr/lib/libgtest_main.so.1.17.0 /usr/lib/libgtest.so.1.17.0
